channel.title: Yorkshire Events - Live Events in Yorkshire, UK
channel.description: Comprehensive RSS feed of live events happening across Yorkshire, UK. Aggregated from multiple sources.

image.title: Yorkshire Events - Live Events in Yorkshire, UK

item.title: Outdoor Yoga at Potteric Carr Nature Reserve
item.description: Join us at Potteric Carr throughout the beautiful summer months for relaxing morning yoga sessions with Boho Warrior Yoga.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Scarborough 400 - Maritime Heritage Centre
item.description: A special exhibition explaining the past 400 years of Scarborough Spa and the town.
item.location: Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, 45 Eastborough, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO11 1PB
item.ify:location: Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, 45 Eastborough, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO11 1PB
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Waves of Waste beach clean at Scarborough North (Multiple Dates)
item.description: Join our Waves of Waste co-ordinators as they give Scarborough North beach a thorough tidy up to protect marine wildlife.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Askrigg Studios – well known Dales artists, Judith Bromley and Robert Nicholls
item.description: We welcome you into our home to view our paintings and prints, books and greetings cards. Open most Wednesdays 10.00am to 5.00 pm from Easter to Christmas If making a […] \n
item.location: Beech House, Askrigg, Leyburn, DL8 3HG
item.ify:location: Beech House, Askrigg, Leyburn, DL8 3HG
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Dales National Park

item.description: Join our Waves of Waste co-ordinators as they give Filey South beach a thorough tidy up to protect marine wildlife.

item.title: Peasholm Park Naval Warfare - Battle of Peasholm
item.description: Set on the Peashom Park lake in beautiful garden surroundings. War breaks out on the lake in the middle of the park when the 20-foot replica boats…
item.location: Peasholm Park, Peasholm Park, North Bay, Scarborough, YO12 7TR
item.ify:location: Peasholm Park, Peasholm Park, North Bay, Scarborough, YO12 7TR

item.title: The Watchers of York: Sculpture Trail
item.dc:creator: Visit York

item.title: Busy Bee Trail
item.description: Buzzzz, do you hear that? The bees are out collecting nectar to make honey. Follow the trail around Staveley and become a bee for the day.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Wildlife Photography for Beginners at Staveley Nature Reserve
item.description: Join our resident photographer for a wildlife photography for beginners workshop.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Summer Holidays - Ampleforth Adventures
item.description: join us this summer to reconnect with nature and enjoy the simple things in life - fresh air and room to play.
item.location: Ampleforth Abbey, Ampleforth Abbey, York, YO62 4EN, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
item.ify:location: Ampleforth Abbey, Ampleforth Abbey, York, YO62 4EN, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Alice in Whitby - Whitby Museum
item.description: A quirky re-imagining of the characters of Lewis Carroll's 'Alice in wonderland' through the Whitby Museum costume collection. Featuring a look at the…
item.location: Whitby Museum, Whitby Museum, Pannet Park, YO21 1RE
item.ify:location: Whitby Museum, Whitby Museum, Pannet Park, YO21 1RE
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Curiouser & Curiouser - Whitby Museum
item.description: An exhibition of the creepy, captivating, magical and mysterious. Featuring stories and artefacts relating to local folklore and mystery - including the…
item.location: Whitby Museum, Whitby Museum, Pannet Park, YO21 1RE
item.ify:location: Whitby Museum, Whitby Museum, Pannet Park, YO21 1RE
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Atkinson Grimshaw: At Home in Yorkshire - Scarborough Art Gallery
item.description: Discover Atkinson Grimshaw’s connections to Yorkshire in this special display of paintings by the Leeds-born artist. Best known for his nocturnal and…
item.location: Scarborough Art Gallery, Scarborough Art Gallery, The Crescent, YO11 2PW
item.ify:location: Scarborough Art Gallery, Scarborough Art Gallery, The Crescent, YO11 2PW
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Free Summer Crafting
item.description: Free Summer Crafting Join us for our free drop-in Summer Crafting Sessions on The Courtyard EVERY TUESDAY AND THURSDAY! From 11-2, our wonderful team of volunteers will be on hand to help you create some exciting summer crafts. Sessions will run every Tuesday and Thursday throughout the summer holidays except for Thurs
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.ify:location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.dc:creator: The Piece Hall

item.title: Knaresborough Museum Association Talk - Desperately Seeking Gertrude (Bell) - Knaresborough Methodist Church
item.description: Desperately Seeking Gertrude (Bell) On the trail of the greatest Yorkshire woman you’ve never heard of - presented by Paul Kirkwood. It’s hard to sum up…
item.location: Knaresborough Methodist Church, Gracious Street, HG5 8DS
item.ify:location: Knaresborough Methodist Church, Gracious Street, HG5 8DS
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: The Flaming Lips & The Beta Band
item.description: The Flaming Lips & The Beta Band American psychedelic rockers The Flaming Lips and Scottish indie rock group The Beta Band are to headline a special night in Halifax next summer The double headlining show will see the bands take to the TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall stage on Thursday 23 July.... \n
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.ify:location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.dc:creator: The Piece Hall

item.title: Romeo & Juliet - RTF at Ripon Races - Ripon Racecourse
item.description: Two hearts. One fate. A timeless love reborn. The Dukes Theatre Company presents Shakespeares Romeo and Juliet, a bold reimagining of the iconic tragedy…
item.location: Ripon Racecourse, Ripon Racecourse, Boroughbridge Road, HG4 1UG
item.ify:location: Ripon Racecourse, Ripon Racecourse, Boroughbridge Road, HG4 1UG
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Tom Jones
item.description: Tom Jones + STONE FOUNDATION Music icon Tom Jones has announced his return to Halifax this summer for a huge outdoor headline show as part of his 2026 Come Gather Round tour. The legendary Welsh singer will take to the stage at TK Maxx Presents Live at The Piece Hall on Saturday 25 July. He... \n
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.ify:location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.dc:creator: The Piece Hall

item.title: Tom Grennan
item.description: Tom Grennan + FINN ASKEW & FIONA-LEE Multi-platinum-selling artist Tom Grennan will bring his electrifying live show to Halifax next summer, joined by special guests Finn Askew and Fiona-Lee. The chart-topping BRIT and Ivor Novello-nominated star will head to TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Sunday 26 July. I
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.description: Gary Numan + LADYTRON Electronic music pioneer, celebrated songwriter and globally renowned musician Gary Numan will headline TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Friday 31 July, joined by special guests Ladytron. Celebrating the 25th anniversary of their classic fourth studio album Bleed American, the exclus
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.description: Holly Johnson + ABC & HEAVEN 17 Singer-songwriter and 80s icon Holly Johnson will bring a taste of Hollywood to Halifax as he headlines a spectacular night next summer. The former Frankie Goes To Hollywood frontman and successful solo artist will headline TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Saturday 15 August, j
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

Fresh from the release of their acclaimed sixth studio album Oh! The Ocean, and a huge headline tour that’s seen them play arenas across the globe – th

item.title: Hollywood Vampires
item.description: Hollywood Vampires + THE DAMNED American rock supergroup Hollywood Vampires will headline TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Saturday 22 August. item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

The London-based four-piece who blend stirring historic audio narratives with rock, electronics and orchestration bring the
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.description: Turnstile + DYNAMITE Fresh from their double triumph at the GRAMMY Awards, Turnstile have confirmed a massive UK EXCLUSIVE headline show here at The Piece Hall. item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.title: Heritage Tours
item.description: Heritage Tours are back for summer 2026 Over its almost 250-year history, The Piece Hall has been home to the weird, the wonderful & the fantastical. Experience a guided tour with one of our knowledgeable heritage guides who will lead you around the grand colonnades and delve deeper into The Piece Hall’s captivating pa
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
